text:
'Tis Christmas Day. 13 years ago this video was uploaded. I look at the videos Recommended for it now, and most of them are 13 years old too. But here's the twist: If we were watching this 13 years ago, these videos would NOT be Recommended just for your watching this video. This is only happening right now. 

Why? What could these videos have in common now that YouTube thinks "If you watched this, you'll like this other thing?" It's because nowadays we've got people like me, and likely people like the person reading this, going back to videos from the olden days. Then we go watch another video from the olden days. And another, and another...
author: @HereForTheComments
